description: Prometheus-compatible metrics collection and export for tracking performance and business metrics

evals.prompt: How do I set up metrics collection for the deal pipeline?
evals.expected_output: Metrics initialization and basic usage pattern

evals.prompt: How do I record timing metrics for each pipeline phase?
evals.expected_output: Phase timing tracking with recordPhaseTiming method

evals.prompt: How do I export metrics in Prometheus format?
evals.expected_output: Prometheus format conversion with proper metric names and labels

evals.prompt: How can I aggregate metrics across multiple pipeline runs?
How do I add custom business metrics beyond the defaults?
evals.expected_output: Custom metric recording with custom counters and labels
assertions: Includes metric name and value parameters
